Title: TC-3.4-F01: should display Creation and End steps automatically

Step Action: Click 'Build Workflow' on a request type.

Step Expected: Workflow Builder shows Creation step and End step created automatically. First step type = Creation (default).

Title: TC-3.4-F02: should add intermediate step with Supervisor actor and action

Step Action: Click 'Add Step' between Creation and End.
Set Actor type = Supervisor (All supervisors within the selected user group.).

Step Expected: Intermediate step is added. Supervisor actor and action are configured. Workflow validates successfully.

Title: TC-3.4-F03: should support all actor types - User, Committee, Group Role, Entity User

Step Action: For each actor type (User, Committee, Group Role, Entity User): select the type and verify options appear.
User: One active system user (excluding Admin and Inspector).
Committee: A selected committee of users (any one member may perform the action).
Group Role: A user holding a specific role within the user group.
Entity User: The user representing the visited entity.
Step Expected: All actor types are available for selection on non-Start/End steps (BR08). Entity User excluded in Phase 1.

Title: TC-3.4-F04: should add notification to a step (all steps: start, end, and intermediate steps)

Step Action: Add a notification (for all intermediate steps with option "on entry").
Repeat when select after a timer (and select wait how many day/ hour/ minute).
Repeat when select notification at the creation step.
Repeat when select notification at end step.
Check if the notification selected was SMS.
Check if the notification selected was Email.
Step Expected:
1- Notification is configured for the step. Template is selectable from the list.
Important: need to be sure, when "on entry" was selected, if the step is beginning now -> the notification should be sent.
2- To check the notification will be sent after the timer selected.
3- Notifications should be sent correctly.
4- SMS will be sent.
5- Email will be sent.

Title: TC-3.4-F06: should clone an existing workflow

Step Action: System clones all steps, actors, actions, notifications.
Step Expected: Cloned workflow appears with all configuration from the source. User can modify and save.

Title: TC-3.4-F07: should save workflow and validate structure

Step Action: Add steps with actors and actions.

Step Expected: Workflow saves successfully. Success message displayed.

Title: TC-3.4-B01: should allow workflow with only Creation and End steps (minimum)

Step Action: Do not add any intermediate steps.
Configure Creation step with actor and action.

Step Expected: Workflow saves successfully with minimum structure (Creation -> End).

Title: TC-3.4-B02: should handle workflow with maximum number of intermediate steps

Step Action: Configure actors and actions for each.

Step Expected: System handles large workflow. All steps saved and validated correctly.

Title: TC-3.4-B03: BR04 - END step should allow only notifications, no actor

Step Action: Verify no Actor field is available.
Add a notification to END step.
Step Expected: END step shows only notification configuration. No Actor or Action fields available (BR04).

Title: TC-3.4-N01: BR01 - should not allow deleting Creation step

Step Action: Attempt to delete the Creation step.
Step Expected: Delete option is disabled or not available. System prevents deletion. Error shown if attempted.

Title: TC-3.4-N02: BR01 - should not allow deleting End step

Step Action: Attempt to delete the End step.
Step Expected: Delete option is disabled or not available. System prevents deletion.

Title: TC-3.4-N03: BR02 - should not allow Committee, inspector, specific user actors on Creation step

Step Action: Then try to select specific User.
Step Expected: All will not be allowed in creation step.

Title: TC-3.4-N06: BR03 - should show validation error for step without Actor

Step Action: Add an Action but do NOT set an Actor.

Step Expected: Validation error: Each step (except END) must have one Actor (BR03). Workflow is NOT saved.

Title: TC-3.4-N07: BR03 - should show validation error for step without Action

Step Action: Set an Actor but do NOT add any Action.

Step Expected: Validation error: Each step (except END) must have at least one Action (BR03). Workflow is NOT saved.

Title: TC-3.4-N09: should not allow building workflow when request instances exist

Step Action: Create requests using the form (instances exist).
Navigate to Build Workflow for that form.
Step Expected: System prevents workflow modification. Error indicates request instances already exist.

Title: TC-3.4-I01: BR06 - actors should resolve from linking relationship

Step Action: Check who receives the next step task.
Step Expected: Supervisors from linked UG1 receive the task as per the linking relationship (BR06).

Title: TC-3.4-I02: BR07 - entity from linking should populate entity field

Step Action: Create a link with Entity Group 'EG1'.
Create a request through the linked form.

Step Expected: Entity field is populated from the linked Entity Group (BR07).

Title: TC-3.4-I03: BR05 - workflow should trigger when request is submitted

Step Action: Build a workflow with 3 steps (Creation -> Review -> End).

Step Expected:
Workflow automatically moves to the Review step. Next step actor is assigned (BR05).
+ a notification will be displayed in the portal in notifications list (the request pending on his action -> and if click on it , he will be redirected to the task details).
Important to check the notification displayed to each user till the end of workflow.

Title:
Check that the admin can't activate the form (without fields and without workflow)
both should be valid

Step Action: Admin tries to activate without fields (or with invalid fields).
Admin tries to activate without workflow (or with invalid workflow)
Step Expected: Both should be valid and exist, to make activate form.

Title: Check to deactivate forms (if not in use).

Step Action: Admin tries to deactivate a form (not in use).
Step Expected: Can deactivate correctly without errors.

Title: Check to delete forms (If not in use).

Step Action: 1- Admin tries to delete a form (not in use).
2- When try to delete a form (in use).
3- Check to delete (not in use) active/ inactive form.
4- Check to delete linked form (but not in use).
Step Expected:
1- Can delete correctly.
2- Error will be displayed as he can't delete it.
3- Can delete both correctly.
4- Can delete it -> and need to check the record in page (linking and targets).

Title: Check to edit workflow (if form not in use)

Step Action: Admin already drag and drop fields (with editable/ visible to certain actors).
1- Edit actor step 2 (from supervisor to manager as example).
4- Try to edit a form (in use).
Step Expected:
1- The workflow will be updated (unless it is in use) -> check also the fields after editing actors/ actions.
2- The form (in use) can't be editable.

Title: Check to delete any user (from users page) after being selected as an actor (try also to delete committee as example)

Step Action: 1- Admin select user X in step 2 as an actor.

Step Expected: The actor will be removed and the form will not be valid.

Title: Check to delete any notification template after being used

Step Action: 1- Admin select template X in step 2 as a notification.
2- He delete it from (Notifications Templates) page.

Step Expected: The notification will be removed and the form will remain valid (as it is optional)

Title: Check to clone invalid WF

Step Expected: Invalid workflow can't be cloned.
